allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); info=d['info']; print\('Name:', info['name']\); print\('Version:', info['version']\); print\('Summary:', info['summary']\); print\('Home page:', info['home_page']\); print\('Project URLs:', info['project_urls']\); print\('Description \(first 3000 chars\):', info['description'][:3000]\)")
